Title: A reference-grade genome assembly for Gossypium bickii and insights into its genome evolution and formation of pigment glands and gossypol

Pathway_Genes.Biosynthetic_Pathway: Gossypol biosynthesis / terpene biosynthesis linked to the mevalonate-derived sesquiterpene pathway
Pathway_Genes.Pathway_Branch_or_Subpathway: Terpenoid biosynthesis module associated with gossypol formation
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Catalyzes hydroxylation/oxidation of terpenoid substrate(s); identified as a geraniol hydroxylase homolog and implicated in the gossypol biosynthetic network
Pathway_Genes.End_Product_Connection_Type: supports precursor/intermediate formation for target-product biosynthesis
Pathway_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: Cotton defense compound; contributes to storage in pigment glands and protection against biotic stress
Pathway_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Accumulation_Site: Pigment glands; measured in leaves and stems in silencing assay
Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Promotes gossypol accumulation; silencing reduced gossypol content in leaves and stems
Pathway_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: Virus-induced gene silencing (VIGS); metabolite profiling of gossypol; qPCR/expression analysis
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. GbiCYP76B6 (Gbi08G2110) was identified as a novel gene affecting gossypol biosynthesis in G. bickii. 2. VIGS silencing significantly reduced gossypol content in leaves and stems. 3. Its expression was downregulated in GoPGF-silenced plants and in glandless G. hirsutum NILs, supporting regulation by GoPGF.
Pathway_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: Upregulated during seed germination in G. bickii, consistent with delayed gland formation and gossypol accumulation
Pathway_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: Higher during germination-associated gland formation; reduced in GoPGF-silenced plants
Pathway_Genes.Interacting_Proteins: GoPGF (regulatory relationship inferred from silencing and promoter analysis)
Pathway_Genes.Omics_Data: Genome assembly and annotation, RNA-seq transcriptome (BioProject PRJNA813940), resequencing context
Pathway_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Candidate target to reduce gossypol content in specific tissues or developmental stages for cottonseed utilization
Pathway_Genes.Potential_Tradeoffs: Reducing gossypol may compromise natural defense
Pathway_Genes.Other_Important_Info: The paper identifies this as a novel gene in the context of cotton gossypol biosynthesis; direct enzymatic substrate within gossypol pathway was not biochemically proven in this study.

Regulation_Genes.Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes: Likely activates GbiCYP76B6 expression via promoter G-box element
Regulation_Genes.Metabolic_Process_Controlled: Pigment gland formation and gossypol biosynthesis
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Essential regulator of pigment gland formation; strong positive regulator associated with gossypol accumulation
Regulation_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: Cotton defense compound stored in pigment glands
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Promotes pigment gland formation and gossypol accumulation; silencing abolishes gland formation and strongly inhibits gossypol in stems and leaves
Regulation_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: VIGS silencing; expression correlation analysis; RNA-seq differential expression; qPCR
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. GoPGF expression pattern is coordinated with delayed pigment gland formation and gossypol biosynthesis in G. bickii. 2. Silencing GoPGF completely inhibited gossypol accumulation in stems and leaves and blocked gland formation. 3. GoPGF positively regulates GbiCYP76B6 and may bind a G-box in its promoter.
Regulation_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: Upregulated during germination in G. bickii, matching delayed gland morphogenesis
Regulation_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: Induced during seed germination rather than ovule development in G. bickii
Regulation_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Key target for engineering delayed gland morphogenesis or low-seed-gossypol/high-plant-defense cotton
Regulation_Genes.Potential_Tradeoffs: Strong suppression may reduce plant defense due to loss of glands and gossypol
Regulation_Genes.Other_Important_Info: The paper states GoPGF may also affect gossypol through other pathways such as TPS and WRKY interactions.
